action_fields.raw_semantics: commanded relative Cartesian end-effector translation + commanded relative RPY rotation + gripper command

observation_7d.semantics: [absolute_eef_x, absolute_eef_y, absolute_eef_z, absolute_roll_rad, absolute_pitch_rad, absolute_yaw_rad, gripper_closed]
observation_7d.notes: base_pose_tool_reached is absolute end-effector pose in the robot base frame. RPY is derived from quaternion xyzw and should be kept in radians.

action_7d.semantics: [commanded_delta_x, commanded_delta_y, commanded_delta_z, commanded_delta_roll_rad, commanded_delta_pitch_rad, commanded_delta_yaw_rad, gripper_command]
action_7d.notes: Action is a commanded controller action, not the exact achieved next-state delta.

world_vector_vs_next_position_delta.interpretation: world_vector is a commanded relative translation. It correlates with achieved next-step translation but is not numerically equal to the measured delta.

rotation_delta_vs_next_rpy_delta.interpretation: rotation_delta is a commanded relative RPY rotation. Directly subtracting absolute Euler angles is a weak validation because of Euler wrapping/frame effects and controller tracking.

gripper_action_vs_next_commanded.interpretation: gripper_closedness_action maps closely to the next timestep gripper_closedness_commanded, confirming it is a gripper command field.

problems_found: Absolute RPY derived from quaternion has Euler wrapping discontinuities near +/-pi.
rotation_delta is commanded orientation motion and should not be expected to equal naive next_rpy - current_rpy.

action_normalization.method: clip each standardized action dimension to q01/q99, then linearly map to [-1, 1]

source.note: Stats are computed from locally available shards after applying the same language, Kuka success, max-64, and gripper-change sampling policy used by the standardized loaders. Rerun after downloading a larger subset.
